autor.title: Đorđe Stojčić
autor.subtitle: Flutter developer
autor.p1: In the red corner. Standing 6 feet 4 inches tall, weighing in at 220 lbs, fighting out of Stockton, California by way of Padinska Skela, Serbia!
autor.p2: Presenting, The Raining, Defending, Undesputed, Longest Active Student at ICT school !!! The one ! The only ! Đorđe !! Stojčić !!!
